interactions.summary: Jiang opens the class by defining gerontocracy as rule by old people, then uses the Southport stabbing and subsequent anti-immigrant riots as an entry point into Western decline on the ground.
He links post-Covid immigration from outside Europe to a felt cultural siege, then joins that demographic pressure to inflation and especially housing prices in Canada.
Jiang asks students why Canada would increase immigration without increasing housing supply.

claims.claim: Jiang defines gerontocracy as rule by old people and frames the lecture as a move from theories of Western decline to concrete trends and examples.
He argues that anti-immigrant violence in Britain after the Southport attack shows how immigration becomes a civil-conflict trigger even when the accused attacker was not himself an immigrant.

He claims that post-Covid immigration into Britain, Australia, France, Germany, Italy, and Canada is culturally destabilizing because many new arrivals come from outside Europe and local populations experience that as invasion or dilution.

Jiang joins immigration pressure to inflation and housing unaffordability, treating Canada as the stark case where immigration rises, housing supply stays flat, and young people lose the dream of owning a home.

signature_moments.moment: The title concept is compressed into one blunt definition: gerontocracy means rule by old people.
signature_moments.source_phrase: Gerontocracy just means rule by old people
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It sets the organizing model for every later example, from immigration to pensions to war.

signature_moments.moment: The Canadian dream of owning a house is declared basically dead.
signature_moments.source_phrase: the Canadian dream of one day having your own house, it's basically dead
signature_moments.why_it_matters: Housing is the first place where abstract decline becomes a lived generational loss.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang defines it as rule by old people and uses it as the lecture's main explanation of Western decline.
Consumer price index, used here as a measure of basic goods such as food and shelter.

chronology_notes.note: Jiang says immigration helped Donald Trump win 'last year's' U.S. election; preserve the 2025-08-29 lecture date for later chronology checks.

uncertainty_notes.note: The transcript renders Rwanda as 'ronda' in one comparison; public reuse should preserve the intended place carefully.
